title: narcissus bulbocodium subsp. nivalis
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium subsp. nivalis, also known as the winter narcissus or hoary winter aconite, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, making it useful for treating coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of the plant, including its bulbs and flowers, can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
